title: ipomoea indica var. variabilis
intro: Ipomoea indica var. variabilis, also known as the blue morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, characterized by its vibrant blue to purple flowers and heart-shaped leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antimalarial effects. The health benefits of Ipomoea indica var. variabilis include reducing anxiety and stress, relieving menstrual cramps and insomnia, and lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be consumed raw or dried for later use.
